name: ls
description: List files and directories in a given path. Use this to explore the project structure.

path.description: The directory to list. Defaults to current directory.

name: read_file
description: Read the contents of a file. Use this to understand existing code.

path.description: The path to the file to read.

name: write_file
description: Create a new file or overwrite an existing one with new content.

path.description: The path to the file to write.

content.description: The full content to write to the file.

name: replace_content
description: Replace a specific substring in a file with new content. Use this for targeted edits.

path.description: The path to the file to edit.

pattern.description: The exact string to find in the file.

replacement.description: The string to replace it with.

name: grep
description: Search for a pattern in files. Use this to find usages of functions or variables.

path.description: The directory or file to search in. Defaults to current directory.

name: bash
description: Execute a bash command in the project directory. Use this for running tests, build commands, or complex shell operations.
